Demonstrating our dedication to authenticity and time-honored traditions, this classic trucker jacket showcases premium denim that's built to endure while telling a story of timeless style. items.name: best diamond top hat ever
items.description: Please do not hate on this item. I spend hours of my life creating this masterpiece. No, I didn't just grab a cylinder, copied it and put the diamond texture. I worked really hard making the texture and the model. I counted every polygon, triangles and dot on this item. If i see any hate on this item, My heart will break into pieces, because in my opinion, this item is the most detailed item ever in the 3D modelling history.
